title: Conditional Control Flow in Intermediate Code
description: A flowchart illustrating the generation and handling of conditional jumps ('if' statements) using the 'however' construct during intermediate code generation.
relationships: Parser sends 'if' node to Code Generator
Code Generator creates a conditional jump quadruple with a placeholder label
Label Manager allocates a new label for the jump target
Backpatch List stores the address of the jump instruction for later fixing
After generating the 'then' and 'else' blocks, the Backpatch List is used to insert the correct target label into the jump instruction
